_comment: Persisted Kling element_ids created via the API path. Read by submitOmniViaApi.mjs. Add new elements via createElementViaApi (or /tmp/kling_create_element.py) and append the {name -> element_id} pair here. Element_ids are stable; don't edit existing entries unless an element is recreated. Names are case-sensitive — match the API element_name exactly.
_source: API account JWT-signed with KLING_ACCESS_KEY/SECRET_KEY in .env.local. NOT the same pool as the kling.ai web UI library (segregated per lesson_kling_api_account_segregation.md).
